title: 11 Herbal Tinctures For Oral Thrush
description: Eucalyptus globulus tinctures contains camphor, eucalyptol, and bornyl acetate as its main bioactive constituents. These compounds have antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to combat the fungal infection that causes oral thrush. Eucalyptol, in particular, has been shown to have a direct effect on Candida albicans, the fungus responsible for oral thrush.
